name: Input Routing Block
description: Classify input before action: TYPE, EXISTING HOME, ROUTE, FIT CHECK, ACTION

name: Adaptive Protocol (Depth Assessment)
description: Select depth 1-5 using pre-scoring gates + parameter scoring + Cynefin classification

name: Pre-Scoring Gates
description: Check hard floors: auth/PII, incident, API/schema boundary, confidence

name: Estimation Table
description: Impact, Confidence, Cost, Time assessment before execution

name: OBJECTIVE Phase
description: Clear goal statement + success criteria + depth assignment

name: OBSERVE Phase
description: Context collection, constraints, dependencies, existing state

name: Research Gate
description: Prior art documented (3-5 bullets D3, full scan D4+)

name: SHAPE Phase
description: Scope defined, edge cases identified, not-in-scope stated

name: HLD Gate
description: High-level design / architecture document present

name: ADR Gate
description: Architecture Decision Record for irreversible choices

name: PLAN Phase
description: Actionable steps with acceptance criteria (D3), dependencies + risk + rollback (D4+)

name: Parallelization Gate
description: Bernstein independence test before dispatching parallel work

name: EXECUTE Phase
description: Implementation. D4+: each step verified before next

name: Basic Verification
description: Build passes or feature renders

name: Evidence-Based Verification
description: Test output or grep evidence proving it works

name: Staged Verification
description: Test + deployment verification + rollback plan

name: Multi-Stage Verification
description: All D4 verification + multi-stage rollout verification

name: MEASURE Phase
description: Success criteria evaluated. D3: quantified. D4+: cross-practice + regression check

name: Finding Resolution Gate
description: All findings from audit resolved or documented

name: LEARN Phase
description: What went well, what surprised. D4+: feedback for Sutra, process improvements

name: Retrospective Gate
description: Retrospective completed and learnings captured

name: Domain Expert Consultation
description: Expert-level domain research before architecture

name: Market Research
description: Market landscape analysis, competitive feature matrix

name: Independent Review
description: Independent review of all artifacts before EXECUTE proceeds

name: Full Retrospective Document
description: Comprehensive retrospective preserved as artifact

name: Triage Log
description: depth_selected, depth_correct, delta, triage_class, reason

name: Existing Artifact Check
description: Before Write of any new visual/deck/doc/diagram/explainer, grep/glob the repo for existing artifacts on the same concept. If hits > 0, list them and require explicit approval to create a duplicate.

name: Tool Selection Gate
description: Before proposing a workflow, score applicable tools on (1) fit for complexity, (2) artifact overhead vs founder appetite, (3) reversibility cost. Output a 3-row comparison table, not a single recommendation. Do not default to GSD just because GSD is installed.

name: Regression Scan
description: Before changing a framework-level prop (presentation, navigation options, gesture config, layout root), enumerate every behavior that prop currently provides. After the change, verify each behavior is still handled by us or by another mechanism.

name: Platform Mandate Check
description: For any code touching react-native imports, read the project's Target Platform section. If single-target, omit cross-platform conditionals (no Platform.OS === 'ios' on iOS-only projects). Write the assumed platform set in the OBSERVE block.

name: Parallelization Gate (OBSERVE)
description: In OBSERVE phase, enumerate research inputs. For each pair, apply Bernstein independence test (does B depend on A's findings?). Independent inputs dispatch to parallel agents. Surface the opportunity by default, not on founder request.

name: Design Spec Gate
description: For UI-touching tasks, produce DESIGN-SPEC.md (visual + interaction) and update DESIGN.md as separate artifacts from functional SPEC.md. Design is not a subsection of SPEC — it is its own approval gate.

name: LLD Gate
description: Low-level design (file-by-file) as a distinct artifact from HLD. HLD = architecture. LLD = concrete file mapping, function signatures, data shapes. Both required at Depth 4+.

name: Feedback Auto-Log
description: When a founder correction is detected (pushback, 'why X not Y', 'you missed X', 'why only GSD'), immediately write os/feedback-to-sutra/{date}-{topic}.md describing the miss + proposed protocol update + triage class. Hard requirement at ALL depths — do not wait for a 'give feedback' prompt. The LEARN loop only closes if misses are captured.
